title: We Don't Talk Anymore
group_key: we don't talk anymore|charlie puth,selena gomez

lyrics.text: We don't talk anymore, we don't talk anymore
lyrics.translation: 我们之间只剩沉默 再回不到耳鬓厮磨

lyrics.text: We don't talk anymore, like we used to do
lyrics.translation: 我们之间只剩沉默 一切都已再难如昨日

lyrics.text: We don't love anymore
lyrics.translation: 爱也因此慢慢消磨

lyrics.text: What was all of it for?
lyrics.translation: 为何会是这样的结果

lyrics.text: Oh, we don't talk anymore, like we used to do
lyrics.translation: 无话不说的从前只剩沉默 一切都已再难如昨日

lyrics.text: I just heard you found the one you've been looking
lyrics.translation: 我听闻你已找到心仪的那个人

lyrics.text: You've been looking for
lyrics.translation: 你寻觅已久的他

lyrics.text: I wish I would have known that wasn't me
lyrics.translation: 真该早些明白我并不在你心里

lyrics.text: Cause even after all this time I still wonder
lyrics.translation: 分开了那么久我却不知为何

lyrics.text: Why I can't move on
lyrics.translation: 还是无法将你放下

lyrics.text: Just the way you did so easily
lyrics.translation: 而你却离开得如此潇洒

lyrics.text: Don't wanna know
lyrics.translation: 不想去想

lyrics.text: what kind of dress you're wearing tonight
lyrics.translation: 今夜的你会为他怎样精挑衣装

lyrics.text: If he's holding onto you so tight
lyrics.translation: 而他又会否如我从前那样

lyrics.text: The way I did before
lyrics.translation: 将你紧拥入怀里徜徉

lyrics.text: I overdosed
lyrics.translation: 我心难平息

lyrics.text: Should've known your love was a game
lyrics.translation: 早该明白你我之间不过游戏

lyrics.text: Now I can't get you out of my brain
lyrics.translation: 那样也不至于忘不了你

lyrics.text: Oh, it's such a shame
lyrics.translation: 噢如此不堪的自己

lyrics.text: We don't talk anymore, we don't talk anymore
lyrics.translation: 我们之间只剩沉默 再回不到耳鬓厮磨

lyrics.text: We don't talk anymore, like we used to do
lyrics.translation: 我们之间只剩沉默 一切都已再难如昨日

lyrics.text: We don't love anymore
lyrics.translation: 爱也因此慢慢消磨

lyrics.text: What was all of it for?
lyrics.translation: 为何会是这样的结果

lyrics.text: Oh, we don't talk anymore, like we used to do
lyrics.translation: 无话不说的从前只剩沉默 一切都已再难如昨日

lyrics.text: I just hope you're lying next to somebody
lyrics.translation: 希望此时的你正轻靠在某个良人怀里

lyrics.text: Who knows how to love you like me
lyrics.translation: 希望她也能像我那般懂得爱你

lyrics.text: There must be a good reason that you're gone
lyrics.translation: 那样也算是个让我说服自己的不错原因

lyrics.text: Every now and then I think you
lyrics.translation: 我常常会幻想着

lyrics.text: Might want me to come show up at your door
lyrics.translation: 再回到在你楼下等我的场景

lyrics.text: But I'm just too afraid that I'll be wrong
lyrics.translation: 但那恐怕只是我自作多情

lyrics.text: Don't wanna know
lyrics.translation: 不想去想

lyrics.text: If you're looking into her eyes
lyrics.translation: 此刻你是否正深情望着她的眼睛

lyrics.text: If she's holding onto you so tight the way I did before
lyrics.translation: 而她又会否如我从前那般 将你紧拥入怀里

lyrics.text: I overdosed
lyrics.translation: 我心难平息

lyrics.text: Should've known your love was a game
lyrics.translation: 早该明白你我之间不过游戏

lyrics.text: Now I can't get you out of my brain
lyrics.translation: 那样也不至于忘不了你

lyrics.text: Oh, it's such a shame
lyrics.translation: 噢如此不堪的自己
